internal_issues.description: CARRY-FORWARD (c1/c2/c3): code_analysis.relabels_standard was TRUE — incorrect for CMB Axis of Evil. Anomaly hijacking ≠ relabeling. Fixed: set to FALSE. relabels_standard count drops from 51 to 50.

detail_verdict_text said 'has not included it in the monitoring suite' — ignoring live power dashboard entry. Replaced with precise language acknowledging the static dashboard while explaining it fails the post-hoc standard.
WIN-034 self-contradiction argument vulnerable to 'metaphorical' retreat. Added preemption sentence: firmament cannot be metaphorical for WIN-034 and physical for WIN-029.
Ecliptic alignment paradox carry-forward from c2: CMB quadrupole-octopole correlation with ecliptic plane (Schwarz et al. 2004) poses dilemma for dome. Added to detail_evidence with DOI.
Land & Magueijo 2005 DOI missing in detail_verdict_text. Added hyperlink to 10.1103/PhysRevLett.95.071301.

code_analysis_updates.rationale: Anomaly hijacking (claiming ΛCDM anomaly as dome counter-evidence) is not the same logical operation as relabeling standard physics. No standard-physics explanation for the Axis of Evil exists to rename.
